Elephant and Castle Mob.description: The Elephant and Castle Mob was a London street gang active during the interwar years, primarily involved in racecourse bookmaking, extortion, and other criminal activities. Based in the Elephant and Castle area, they were led by the McDonald brothers and allied with the Birmingham Boys. They rivaled the Sabini gang for control of bookmaking pitches and were eventually forced out by Sabini with Sicilian mafiosi, disappearing by the end of World War II.

descriptions: The Birmingham Boys allied with the Elephant and Castle Mob.

descriptions: Elephant and Castle Mob was allied with the Finsbury Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: They were allied to the Birmingham gang, often called the Brummagems, led by Billy Kimber; the Camden Town gang, led by George Sage and the Finsbury Boys, led by Freddie Gilbert.

Cleveland crime family.description: Italian American Mafia crime family based in Cleveland, Ohio, formed around 1920 by Joseph Lonardo. It peaked with 60 made members in the 1950s and exerted influence over the Teamsters and Las Vegas casinos. After a gang war in the late 1970s and subsequent convictions, the family declined but remains active in illegal gambling and loansharking.

Fukuhaku-kai.description: The Fukuhaku-kai is a yakuza organization based in Fukuoka, Japan, founded in 1985 by Akira Umedu. It is a designated yakuza group under the Organized Crime Countermeasures Law with an estimated membership of 60. The group operates in the Nakasu red-light district and has been involved in conflicts with the Yamaguchi-gumi and other local syndicates.

descriptions: Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with Dojin-kai over attempts to enter Nakasu territory.
edges.evidence_quote: The Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with four different Yamaguchi-affiliates over the concessions of Nakasu , the largest red-light district in Kyushu, and also with the Dojin-kai and Kudo-kai over their attempts to enter the same territory.

descriptions: Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with Kudo-kai over attempts to enter Nakasu territory.
edges.evidence_quote: The Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with four different Yamaguchi-affiliates over the concessions of Nakasu , the largest red-light district in Kyushu, and also with the Dojin-kai and Kudo-kai over their attempts to enter the same territory.

descriptions: Fukuhaku-kai is a designated yakuza group, a subset of Yakuza.
edges.evidence_quote: Fukuoka Prefecture has the largest number of designated yakuza groups among all of the prefectures, at 5; the Kudo-kai , the Taishu-kai , the Fukuhaku-kai , the Dojin-kai , and the Namikawa-kai .

descriptions: Fukuhaku-kai caused a conflict with Yamaguchi-gumi involving firearms in 2004.
edges.evidence_quote: The Fukuhaku-kai has never been a member of this federation, however has caused at least one conflict with the Yamaguchi-gumi, which involved firearms, in 2004.

Westies.description: The Westies were a New York City-based Irish-American organized crime gang operating from the early 1960s until 1988. They were involved in racketeering, drug trafficking, contract killing, and other crimes, and were allied with the Italian-American Mafia. Based in Hell's Kitchen, Manhattan, the gang was responsible for 60-100 murders between 1968 and 1986. The gang was founded by James Coonan in the mid-1960s.

descriptions: The Westies murdered a Colombo associate.
edges.evidence_quote: Irish mobster Jimmy Coonan became Stein's bodyguard. Coonan and the Westies gang murdered Stein in 1977

descriptions: DeMeo crew leader Roy DeMeo formed an alliance with the Westies on behalf of the Gambino family.
edges.evidence_quote: DeMeo secured his induction into the Gambino family by forming an alliance with an Irish-American gang known as the Westies

descriptions: The Gambino family is allied with the Westies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Westies

descriptions: The Westies helped Gotti by intimidating a witness.
edges.evidence_quote: Romual Piecyk decided not to testify against Gotti thanks to Boško "The Yugo" Radonjić, the head of the Westies in Hell's Kitchen, Manhattan.

descriptions: The Westies are listed as an ally of the Gambino family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Buffalo crime family, Camorra Casalesi clan, Chicago Outfit, Cleveland crime family, Colombo crime family, Cosa Nostra Inzerillo Mafia clan, Corleonesi, DeCavalcante crime family, Detroit Partnership, Genovese crime family, Inzerillo Mafia clan, Los Angeles crime family, Lucchese crime family, New Orleans crime family, Patriarca crime family, Philadelphia crime family, Trafficante crime family, Aryan Brotherhood, Bloods, Crips, Group America, Hells Angels MC, Latin Kings, Mexican Mafia, Pagan's MC, Westies

descriptions: The infobox lists Westies as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Westies

descriptions: Westies is listed as an ally of the Gambino family in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Westies

descriptions: The Gambino family lists the Westies as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Westies

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Westies

descriptions: Gambino family allied with the Westies from 1977 to 1992 after brokering a peace agreement.
edges.evidence_quote: The Gambino-Westies alliance (1977–1992) resulted from an ongoing war between the Genovese family and the Westies.

descriptions: Infobox lists Westies as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Westies

descriptions: Gambino family cooperated with Westies, using them as hitmen.
edges.evidence_quote: la cooperazione tra la mafia italo-americana e la mafia irlandese ( John Gotti della famiglia Gambino e James Coonan dei Westies ) è cosa nota (i Westies sono stati utilizzati dai Gambino in particolare nel ruolo di sicari )

descriptions: Group America originated when its founder joined the Westies.
edges.evidence_quote: The group originated in the 1970s, when Serbian nationalist Boško "The Yugo" Radonjić emigrated from Yugoslavia to the United States and joined the Westies

descriptions: The Kitchen Irish are loosely based on the Westies.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kitchen Irish are loosely based on the Westies.

descriptions: The Westies had a partnership with the Italian-American Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: They were partnered with the Italian-American Mafia

descriptions: The Westies formed an alliance with the Gambino crime family via Roy DeMeo.
edges.evidence_quote: This prompted Coonan to form an alliance with Roy DeMeo of the Gambino crime family.

descriptions: The Westies became a de facto arm of the Gambino family, sharing profits and taking murder contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: DeMeo secured his induction into the Gambino family by forming an alliance with an Irish-American gang known as the Westies

descriptions: The Westies leader Boško Radonjić was a trusted enforcer for Gambino family boss John Gotti.
edges.evidence_quote: The best known is Boško Radonjić , leader of the Irish-American organized crime group " the Westies ", and a trusted enforcer of Gambino family boss John Gotti from 1988 to 1992.

descriptions: The Westies were allied with the Gambino crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gambino crime family .

descriptions: The Genovese crime family sought control over the convention center, threatening the Westies.
edges.evidence_quote: In the Irish/Italian Mob War of the 1970s, the Irish mob saw an increased threat from the Italian Mafia as the Genovese crime family sought control over the soon-to-be-built Jacob K. Javits Convention Center.

descriptions: The Genovese crime family was a threat to the Westies over control of the convention center.
edges.evidence_quote: the Irish mob saw an increased threat from the Italian Mafia as the Genovese crime family sought control over the soon-to-be-built Jacob K. Javits Convention Center

descriptions: The Westies were rivals with Mickey Spillane's gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mickey Spillane 's gang

descriptions: Members of Reconnaissance General Bureau participated in Lazarus hacking campaigns.
edges.evidence_quote: the US Department of Justice indicted three members of the Reconnaissance General Bureau ... for having participated in several Lazarus hacking campaigns
